# @platform/tooling-codegen

Tooling package for GraphQL Code Generator and architecture-safe generated artifact workflows.

```text
Owner: team-architecture
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Own GraphQL Code Generator configuration
- Define schema loading and generated artifact paths
- Produce contract artifacts without becoming runtime application code

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not run in browser production runtime
- Does not own application routes
- Does not bypass governance evidence for generated artifacts

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Run during development or CI to generate typed GraphQL contract artifacts
- Emit generated files into documented contract package paths
